response.justification: This candidate has a strong track record in web and backend development but lacks the two primary mandatory requirements: substantial C++ experience (only ~6 months of professional C++ at National Instruments in 2014-2015) versus the 5-10 years required, and zero exposure to capital markets, investment banking, or financial services domains. While the resume demonstrates general technical capability and excellent communication skills, the experience profile is fundamentally misaligned with a capital markets C++ role.
strengths: Proven ability to learn and contribute effectively across diverse technology stacks and business domains
Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops, public talks, and clear technical writing
Extensive backend and systems development experience with complex infrastructure and real-time performance optimization
concerns: Critical C++ experience gap: 6 months of documented professional C++ work versus mandatory 5-10 years required
Entire career focused on web/mobile/backend development with no Windows platform specialization or exposure
Zero experience in capital markets, investment banking, fixed income, or financial services domains
